title: UpdateListRequest
description: Request body for updating an existing List.

name.description: The updated name of the List.

due_date.description: Updated due date as Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

due_date_time.description: Whether the due date includes a time component.

assignee.description: User ID to assign, or null to unassign.

unset_status.description: Set to true to clear the List status.
